description: Canonical contract for PythonIDE native iOS capabilities (v2). Single source of truth for Python modules, AppUI bridges, topic pages, navigation, runtimes, docs, Agent routing, and audit surfaces.

device.description: Direct read-only device status facts exposed by the iOS runtime.

status.summary: Read battery, charging state, device model, and system version from the native runtime.

native_query.description: Read-only query bridge for current app/device/user-authorized local data.

photos_count.summary: Count Photos library assets after Photos authorization is available.

photos_summary.summary: Summarize Photos library assets after Photos authorization is available.

contacts_count.summary: Count Contacts entries after Contacts authorization is available.

contacts_summary.summary: Return bounded Contacts samples after Contacts authorization is available.

calendar_events.summary: Read calendar events in a bounded date window after Calendar authorization is available.

reminders.summary: Read reminders after Reminders authorization is available.

location.summary: Read the current location after Location authorization is available.

device_status.summary: Read local battery and device status facts.

app_info.summary: Read local app bundle, locale, timezone, and device facts.

clipboard_text.summary: Read bounded text from the general pasteboard.

notification_settings.summary: Read current local notification authorization and delivery settings.

native.description: User-visible native mutation/export bridge for Photos, Calendar, and share sheet actions.

photo_save.summary: Save a workspace image or video file into the user's Photos library.

calendar_create.summary: Create a Calendar event through EventKit after Calendar authorization is available.

file_export.summary: Present the iOS share/export sheet for a workspace file.

categories.deviceSensors: Device state, sensors, location, feedback, biometrics, and health.
categories.systemServices: Permissions, persistence, secrets, dialogs, notifications, contacts, calendar, live activities, and NFC.
categories.mediaVision: Photos, audio, speech, video, Vision, and Core ML.
categories.networkData: Network, WebSocket, Bluetooth, background tasks, and C extension availability.
categories.automationExtensions: Shortcuts, Objective-C Runtime access, system framework access, and keyboard toolbar integration.

photo_picker.summary: Inline Photos library picker inside AppUI forms.

camera_picker.summary: Inline camera capture control for AppUI screens.

file_importer.summary: UIDocumentPicker bridge for arbitrary files in AppUI.

share_link.summary: System share sheet via AppUI ShareLink.

map_view.summary: MapKit-backed map view for AppUI location workflows.

video_player.summary: Embedded AVPlayer view for AppUI; prefer over avplayer module in MiniApps.

player_controller.summary: Playback controller paired with VideoPlayer in AppUI.

camera.summary: Camera capture via photos.capture_image or AppUI CameraPicker.

file_picker.summary: File selection has no import module; use AppUI FileImporter.

share.summary: System share sheet has no import module; use AppUI ShareLink.

scene.summary: SpriteKit scene runtime for games and animations.
